title: Excalibur | SootyChimneys Support
description: This is a support pack that converts the Sooty Chimneys mod textures to match the awesome Excalibur ResourcePack.
body:
![Sooty Chimneys](https://i.postimg.cc/63ByqyRv/Sooty-Chimney-Presentation-2.png)

This is a support pack that converts the [Sooty Chimneys](https://modrinth.com/mod/sooty-chimneys) Mod textures to better match the awesome [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) ResourcePack.

__**This Pack contains :**__

*   All Chimneys from the mod retextured

__**Installation :**__

Ingame

\-> Click "Options…"

\-> Click "Resource Packs…"

\-> Click "Open Resource Pack Folder"

\-> Drag and Drop the Excalibur\_Sooty Chimneys Support.zip file into the "resourcepacks" folder

\-> Move the Excalibur Sooty Chimneys Support resource pack from the left column to the right

\-> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

\-> Select "Done"

__**Models Showcase**__

![Chimneys Showcase](https://i.postimg.cc/yd0tQ8rv/Sooty-Chimneys-Presentation-Models-1.png)

__**Credits**__

Maffhew : Author of the [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) Resourcepack

mortuusars : Author of the mod [Sooty Chimneys](https://modrinth.com/mod/sooty-chimneys)

Shetiphian : I used his platforms mod on the picture presentation
